camera_category.name: Default / closest (cam 3)
camera_category.desc: Default value. Converts to camera value 3 (closest framing). Used by most monsters.

camera_category.name: Large (cam 0)
camera_category.desc: Converts to camera value 0 (farthest of the low range).

camera_category.name: Very large / pull back (cam 4)
camera_category.desc: Bit 0x4 set -> camera value 4. Makes the camera pull back further (large enemies).

camera_category.name: Very large / pull back (cam 4)
camera_category.desc: Same result as value 4 (bit 0x4 set, bit 0x8 clear — the engine ignores the other bits). Not used by vanilla monsters.

camera_category.name: Very large / pull back (cam 4)
camera_category.desc: Same result as value 4 (bit 0x4 set, bit 0x8 clear — the engine ignores the other bits). Not used by vanilla monsters.

camera_category.name: Very large / pull back (cam 4)
camera_category.desc: Same result as value 4 (bit 0x4 set, bit 0x8 clear — the engine ignores the other bits). Not used by vanilla monsters.

camera_category.name: Unused (cam 5)
camera_category.desc: Bit 0x8 set -> camera value 5, a distinct class from 4-7. Branch exists but is never triggered by shipped data.
